# Studio Faraj

> Full-stack web development studio based in Sciacca, Sicily, Italy. We build websites, e-commerce platforms, and web applications entirely with custom code — no templates, no WordPress, no Shopify, no third-party website builders.

## About

Studio Faraj is a team of skilled full-stack developers specializing in building high-performance, custom-coded digital solutions. Founded in Sciacca (Agrigento), Sicily, we serve businesses across Italy and internationally.

What makes us different: every project we deliver is written from scratch using modern technologies. We don't use page builders, pre-made templates, or third-party e-commerce platforms. Our clients own 100% of their code — clean, maintainable, and built to scale.

## Services

- **Custom Web Development**: Fully coded websites and web applications built with React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Node.js. Server-side rendering, SEO-optimized, responsive on every device.
- **Custom E-Commerce**: Online stores developed entirely from scratch — custom shopping carts, payment gateway integrations (Stripe, PayPal), inventory management, and analytics dashboards. No Shopify, no WooCommerce, no templates.
- **UI/UX Design**: Research-driven interface design with responsive layouts, accessibility standards, and conversion-focused user experiences.
- **SEO & Web Marketing**: Technical SEO audits, on-page optimization, ongoing SEO subscription plans, Google Ads management, and content strategy. We offer monthly SEO maintenance packages.
- **AI & Automation**: Custom chatbots, predictive analytics, workflow automation, and AI-powered features integrated into web applications.
- **Managed Hosting & Cloud Infrastructure**: High-performance hosting on Vercel, Google Cloud, and AWS. Domain management, SSL certificates, CDN setup, server monitoring, and 24/7 uptime support.
- **Maintenance & Support**: Flexible maintenance plans including security updates, performance monitoring, content updates, backups, and technical support.
- **Strategic IT Consulting**: Technology audits, digital transformation roadmaps, architecture planning, and technology stack advisory.

## Tech Stack

- **Frontend**: React, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS, HTML5, CSS3
- **Backend**: Node.js, Python, Firebase, REST APIs, GraphQL
- **Infrastructure**: Vercel, Google Cloud, AWS, Docker, CI/CD pipelines
- **Databases**: Firestore, PostgreSQL, MongoDB
- **CMS**: Headless CMS (Sanity, Strapi), custom admin dashboards
- **Tools**: Git, GitHub, Figma, Google Analytics, Search Console

## Key Differentiators

1. **100% Custom Code**: Every website and application is written from scratch. No WordPress, no Shopify, no page builders, no templates.
2. **Full-Stack Expertise**: Our team handles frontend, backend, databases, hosting, and DevOps — one team, end-to-end.
3. **SEO Built-In**: Every project includes technical SEO optimization as standard, with optional ongoing SEO subscription plans.
4. **Performance-First**: We build for Core Web Vitals excellence — fast load times, smooth interactivity, and visual stability.
5. **Ownership**: Clients receive full ownership of their codebase. No vendor lock-in, no recurring platform fees.
6. **Rapid Delivery**: Most projects delivered within 15 business days, with 24/7 support.

- Languages: Italian, English
